states.name: Hibiki
states.title: Scarlet Oni Samurai
states.description:
In a land far to the East, there lives an oni. This oni, however, is a slayer of her fellows.
She prays to no gods, performs no rituals. Yet when battle looms, she is the first to ready her blade. She is the Scarlet Oni, the one who strikes at her fellows' throats without mercy.
"I'm Hibiki, the oni hunter. Eh? Why's an oni hunting oni? ...Say that one more time and I'll take your head clean off."

states.name: Hibiki
states.title: Scarlet Oni Samurai
states.description:
Hotter, hotter, hotter. Blood seeks, craves blood. The fire within her rages outward, onward. It burns those her crimson gaze passes over. In her nightclothes, she can even hear it— the pounding rush of her heart pumping her burning blood.
Oni blood, irresistibly pulling her along a path she has no choice but to walk.
"Your blood's red, same as mine..."

states.name: Hibiki
states.title: Scarlet Oni Samurai
states.description: "Tempura, ise-ebi...damn if this stuff ain't good. And the takoyaki. ...Nom nom. Yeah, that's good too. C'mon, eat already." Rough speech, and an utterly relaxed posture, with plenty of half-eaten food around to top it off. A vision from another possible world, perhaps. A world with no war between humans and oni. The happy laughter of the oni maiden echoes, faintly, from distant memories.
